Mike Yastrzemski back in lineup to face Padres
news_items.summary: The stage is set as the Atlanta Braves look for a second win in this four-game series against the San Diego Padres. Mike Yastrzemski has been added to the lineup after being reactivated coming off a forearm injury. Against San Diego’s Walker Buehler, Yastrzemski averages a .646 OPS and .240 batting average. But, if he […]
